🚀 systemfehler MVP Roadmap

This page outlines the minimum viable product goals and current epic breakdown for the systemfehler platform.

🎯 MVP Goals

  • Collect structured tools and help offers
  • Serve them in an accessible frontend
  • Allow editorial improvements and plain-language contributions
  • Support future enrichment with LLMs or open data

🧩 Epics & Subtasks

1. Modular Crawler

  • Scaffold base logic
  • Add one working crawler
  • Output valid entries.json
  • Track urls.json sources

2. JSON Schema + Validation

  • Define schema
  • Write validator (CLI)
  • Check existing entries

3. Editorial Dashboard

  • Status: draft/approved/flagged
  • Moderation view in frontend
  • Approve / delete / edit entries

4. Plain Language

  • Field for simplified description
  • Toggle to compare full/simplified
  • Flag missing simplifications

5. LLM Enrichment (Optional)

  • Add fields for ai_summary, ai_tags
  • Run enrichments via script or API

Join us on GitHub to contribute, translate, or suggest features.
